title: trifolium squarrosum subsp. tunetanum
intro: Trifolium squarrosum subsp. tunetanum, also known as Tunetian clover, is a subspecies of perennial legume native to North Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Tunetian clover include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal medicine, the plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in the form of tinctures or capsules, to harness its potential therapeutic benefits.
